body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends! So I should have another photo, of that study in black and pink I’ve been hiding in my page for those paying attention, posted today. Still a need quiet a few more followers to start getting the “enhanced” photos. I missed posting one yesterday, but given the incentive, maybe I should stretch it out ;) to a M/W/F instead of an every day thing and let folks have a chance to get to see more. 🖤

As I mentioned last night, I wrote another spicy story, it can be found here. I’m not sure if it’s just too long for folks to read, or if its too long for the feed to share it, or maybe it’s just too different than my other stuff, but it’s got zero likes or shares (other than me) so just in case folks aren’t seeing it, I figured I’d link it. But I’ll leave it at that if there’s still no interest. 🖤

I hope you all have a wonderful day. 🖤🖤🖤
